summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Usina Recicla B2B landing page iteration 2. All features verified including new pages (Transporte, MTR, CADRI), blog removal, updated homepage title, navigation, WhatsApp integration, and mobile responsiveness. All tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with new title 'Coleta e Destinacao de Residuos Industriais em Todo o Brasil'
Homepage CTA button 'Solicitar Coleta ou Orcamento' works correctly
Diferenciais section displays 4 cards (Documentacao Ambiental, Engenheiro Ambiental, Rastreabilidade, Infraestrutura)
Services bento grid shows 3 cards including 'Transporte de Residuos Classe I'
Navigation dropdown for Services shows all 6 sub-pages correctly
New page /transporte-de-residuos-classe-i renders with correct content
New page /mtr-manifesto-transporte-residuos renders with FAQ accordion
New page /cadri-certificado-movimentacao-residuos renders with FAQ accordion
Existing page /servicos displays all services including transport
Existing page /sobre shows CEO Raphael Pascon information
Existing page /documentacao-ambiental shows MTR CDF CADRI cards
Existing page /coleta-de-efluentes renders correctly
Existing page /gestao-de-residuos renders correctly
Blog route /blog properly removed (returns 404/not found)
WhatsApp floating button visible after 1.5s delay and links to wa.me/5519971636969
Footer CTA displays 'Solicitar Coleta ou Orcamento'
FAQ accordion on homepage opens/closes functionality works (6 items found)
Mobile responsive design works correctly at 375px width
Mobile navigation menu opens and closes properly
Logo displays correctly in navbar with proper src and alt attributes
All WhatsApp CTAs (hero, navbar, footer) link to correct phone number (5519971636969)
